title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a mobile phone.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you decided which phone to buy? || Woman: I liked the expensive one in the advert, but I don't need such a good camera. || Man: What about the cheaper model? || Woman: That's the one I'm considering. [8]It has enough memory for my music and photos, and the battery lasts longer than on my old phone[/8]. || Man: Sounds practical. || Woman: Exactly. I want something useful, not just fashionable. || Man: That sounds sensible. || Woman: Yes, I think it will make things much easier next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you decided which phone to buy?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I liked the expensive one in the advert, but I don't need such a good camera.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the cheaper model?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's the one I'm considering. It has enough memory for my music and photos, and the battery lasts longer than on my old phone.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Sounds practical.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly. I want something useful, not just fashionable.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, I think it will make things much easier next time.

questions.question: Why does the woman like the cheaper phone?

options.A: It has the features she needs.

questions.explanation: She says it has enough memory and a better battery, so it has what she needs.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman telling a friend about a train journey.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Was your train journey okay? || Woman: Not really. It left on time, and I found a seat, so that was fine. But then we stopped outside Reading for ages. || Man: Was there a problem with the weather? || Woman: No, [9]they said another train had broken down in front of us, so we couldn't move until the line was clear[/9]. || Man: How late were you? || Woman: Nearly an hour. || Man: I can see why. || Woman: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was your train journey okay?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not really. It left on time, and I found a seat, so that was fine. But then we stopped outside Reading for ages.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was there a problem with the weather?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, they said another train had broken down in front of us, so we couldn't move until the line was clear.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How late were you?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Nearly an hour.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I can see why.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

questions.question: Why was the woman delayed?

options.C: There was a problem with another train.

questions.explanation: She says another train had broken down in front of them.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a local swimming pool.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you been to the swimming pool since it reopened? || Man: Yes, yesterday. The new changing rooms are much cleaner, and the café looks nice. || Woman: Is the water warmer now? || Man: A little, but [10]I was disappointed that the pool still gets so crowded after school. I could hardly swim properly[/10]. || Woman: Maybe mornings are quieter. || Man: I might try that next time. || Woman: Good idea. || Man: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you been to the swimming pool since it reopened?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, yesterday. The new changing rooms are much cleaner, and the café looks nice.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Is the water warmer now?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: A little, but I was disappointed that the pool still gets so crowded after school. I could hardly swim properly.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe mornings are quieter.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I might try that next time.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good idea.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

questions.question: What disappointed the man about the swimming pool?
questions.explanation: He says the pool was crowded and he could hardly swim properly.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman telling a colleague about a conference.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How was the conference in Leeds? || Woman: Useful overall. The hotel wasn't special, but it was close to the station. || Man: Were the talks interesting? || Woman: Some were. [11]The best session was about helping customers online; I got several ideas we could use in our department[/11]. || Man: That's good. Did you meet many people? || Woman: A few, but networking wasn't really the main benefit for me. || Man: That makes sense. || Woman: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How was the conference in Leeds?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Useful overall. The hotel wasn't special, but it was close to the station.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Were the talks interesting?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Some were. The best session was about helping customers online; I got several ideas we could use in our department.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's good. Did you meet many people?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: A few, but networking wasn't really the main benefit for me.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

questions.question: What did the woman find most useful at the conference?
questions.explanation: She says the best session gave her ideas they could use in her department.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a book club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you still going to the book club? || Man: Yes, although I nearly stopped going. The books are sometimes longer than I can manage. || Woman: Is the group friendly? || Man: Very. [12]That's why I keep going. Even when I haven't finished the book, the discussions are relaxed and people listen to each other[/12]. || Woman: That sounds nice. || Man: It is. I just need to read faster. || Woman: I'm sure that will help. || Man: I hope so. It's better to sort it out early.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you still going to the book club?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, although I nearly stopped going. The books are sometimes longer than I can manage.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Is the group friendly?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Very. That's why I keep going. Even when I haven't finished the book, the discussions are relaxed and people listen to each other.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds nice.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It is. I just need to read faster.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I'm sure that will help.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. It's better to sort it out early.

questions.question: Why does the man continue going to the book club?

options.C: He wants to make new friends.

questions.explanation: He says the relaxed discussions and listening atmosphere are why he keeps going.

extracts.context: You will hear a girl talking about a school music performance.
extracts.audio_script: Boy: Are you nervous about playing in the concert? || Girl: A bit, but not as much as last year. || Boy: Have you practised enough? || Girl: Yes. [13]What worries me is that my parents are sitting in the front row, and I always make mistakes when I know they're watching closely[/13]. || Boy: They just want to support you. || Girl: I know, but I wish they'd sit further back. || Boy: That sounds fair. || Girl: Yes, and I think everyone will understand the situation.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Are you nervous about playing in the concert?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: A bit, but not as much as last year.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Have you practised enough?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes. What worries me is that my parents are sitting in the front row, and I always make mistakes when I know they're watching closely.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: They just want to support you.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I know, but I wish they'd sit further back.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That sounds fair.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, and I think everyone will understand the situation.

questions.question: Why is the girl nervous?

options.C: Her parents will be watching her.

questions.explanation: She says she worries because her parents will be sitting in the front row watching closely.
